marketState: neutral, near-term bearish technicals inside a longer-term bullish weather/positioning setup
summary: Front-month gas ($2.93) is trading essentially at model fair value ($2.92 now, band $2.42-$3.42), so there is no clean mispricing edge either way today. The longer-dated picture leans constructive: 8-16 day weather demand is running +38% vs 5y and above its historical max (rangePos 1.16), the fair-value curve itself drifts up to $3.01 by plus21D, and managed money is net short at just the 8th percentile of the last 5 years - a crowded-short setup vulnerable to squeezes if heat/cooling demand keeps surprising high. Seasonality is a soft tailwind (69% odds of a higher price in 4 weeks, +3.7% typical move) but flagged Low reliability, and storage is running +183 Bcf above the 5y average with a bearish +17 Bcf surprise, capping upside. Short-term technicals point the other way: 4 of 6 timeframes (5m, 4h, 1d, 1w) show a bearish trend with 50<200 death crosses and negative MACD, RSI (38-55) is not yet oversold so there is room to fall further, front trades at a slight discount to next month, and near-term (1-7D) weather demand is basically normal (0% vs 5y) - so the next 1-10 days lack a bullish trigger even though the multi-week backdrop is more supportive.

longTerm.sizing: 1R approx 1% account risk, take half off at TP1
longTerm.rationale: 8-16 day weather demand is +38% vs 5y and above its historical max with a sharply rising trend (+20% vs normal), the fair-value curve drifts up to $3.01 by plus21D while price sits at fair today, and managed money is net short at only the 8th percentile of 5 years - a crowded short that can squeeze on continued heat. Seasonality adds a mild tailwind (69% odds higher in 4 weeks) though flagged low reliability.
longTerm.invalidation: 8-16D demand outlook cools back toward normal (rangePos back under ~1.0), storage keeps printing bearish/oversized build surprises, or COT shorts get covered without any upward price reaction

shortTerm.sizing: 0.5R approx 0.5% account risk given low conviction
shortTerm.rationale: 4 of 6 technical timeframes (5m, 4h, 1d, 1w) show a bearish trend with 50<200 death crosses and negative MACD, front trades at a slight discount to next month (mild backwardation), and near-term 1-7D weather demand is flat vs 5y with no bullish catalyst. Price sits right at fair value on both the now and +7D checks, so this is a momentum trade, not a valuation one - hence low conviction.
shortTerm.invalidation: RSI pushes toward overbought with a bullish EMA cross reasserting (as already flashing on the 15m timeframe), or 1-7D weather demand jumps materially above 5y norms

keyDrivers: 8-16D weather demand +38% vs 5y, above historical max and rising fast (+20% vs normal)
Managed money net short at 5-year 8th percentile - crowded short, squeeze risk
Fair value curve slopes up from $2.92 now to $3.01 by plus21D while price sits at fair today
Storage +183 Bcf above 5y average with a bearish +17 Bcf build surprise caps upside
Technicals bearish on 4 of 6 timeframes with 50<200 death crosses, capping near-term bounces
risks: Seasonality reliability flagged Low (63pp 10-90% spread) - probability edges are weak
Storage overhang could dominate and override a weather-driven rally
Steep winter contango (Dec/Jan far above front) reflects weather-risk premium already priced in, limiting how much front-month can re-rate
disclaimer: Informational only, not financial advice. Auto-generated hourly.
